title: Approval Card (surface-neutral)
description: Surface-neutral abstraction of the human approval surface (release-spec.md §7.5; model §10 #4 / DD-10). The card is what a reviewer sees before deciding; it carries the Recommended + two alternates, any warnings traveling with the item, media references, scheduling, provenance, a TTL, and the bounded action set. The surface adapter (Discord reference implementation lives in engine/shared/components-v2.js + pipelines/ docs) renders this shape; the schema deliberately holds NO surface-specific fields (no component trees, no reaction emoji, no channel/message IDs). All resource references are $CONTENT_HOME-relative strings; absolute paths are forbidden. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

content_id.description: Stable content identifier shared across all artifacts for this item.

title.description: Short human-facing heading for the card.

brand.description: Brand id this card belongs to.

format.description: Content format/shape (e.g. single, thread, image, video) as declared by the package.

content_form.description: Item form (model §3 rule 8); trend-derived items may be quote-retweet.

variants.description: The candidate texts shown to the reviewer. By the N=3 contract (DD-11) the chain emits a Recommended plus two alternates; the card carries them in ranked order with the strongest first.

label.description: Variant slot label; 'recommended' is the ranked-strongest candidate.

score.description: Aggregate rubric score for this variant (display signal).

delta.description: Score delta versus the Recommended variant (0 for the Recommended itself).

bars_recommended.description: True when a warn-disposition code prevents this variant from occupying the Recommended slot (release-spec.md §14.4).

media.description: Media references attached to the card, $CONTENT_HOME-relative.

source_class.description: Provenance class of this media (mirrors index-entry source_class).

warnings.description: Soft codes traveling with the item to the reviewer (model §2 Content Item invariant). Each references a registry code in rules/codes.md.

bars_recommended.description: Whether this warn code demotes its variant out of the Recommended slot.

scheduled_time.description: Intended publish time inherited from the slot (DD-22).

provenance.description: How the item was created and why it is strong (release-spec.md §2.4).

ttl.description: Time-to-live as an ISO-8601 duration; card expiry + slot disposition driven by the TTL sweep (DD-15).

expires_at.description: Absolute expiry instant for the card (DD-15).

actions.description: Bounded set of decisions the reviewer may take. Surface-neutral action verbs; the adapter binds them to its own controls. attach_media routes through the DD-12 re-gate; edit counts as approval (release-spec.md §2.4).

status.description: Lifecycle of the card itself (distinct from the queue entry state).

created_at.description: When the card was constructed (persisted before posting, DD-4).
